user_story: The Industrial Data Platform is designed to collect, process, and analyze sensor data from industrial environments, providing stakeholders with real-time reporting, automated email alerts, and an interactive web dashboard. The platform integrates seamlessly with SCADA systems, mainframes, and other data sources to centralize and streamline data management. It supports multiple usage modes, including interactive data processing, batch operations for scheduled tasks, mainframe data imports, and continuous sensor monitoring via serial or MQTT connections. This ensures comprehensive data handling for industrial applications while maintaining technical accuracy and alignment with platform functionality.
